name: T3.6-1440p-with-bgra-screen-source
description: T3.2 but with the synthetic screen source in 32BGRA instead of the post-task-1 420v default. Reverse-sweep of task-1 tuning 1 — doubles the per-frame screen IOSurface from 1.5 bpp to 4 bpp. If T3.2 passes but T3.6 fails, the switch to 420v was load-bearing for stability at 1440p. If both pass (or both fail), the pixel format wasn't the critical factor. Corresponds to hypothesis H1 in docs/research/11-m2-pro-video-pipeline-deep-dive.md.
